evidence: 222 tests across 18 test classes — reasonable coverage density for a codebase of this size

Unit tests exist for: HttpApiUtils, WrapHandler, HandlersTest, ExploreResponseBuilder, RadialPlot, GrammarConfigLoader, RelationUtils, RelationsValidation, CollocateProfileComparator, MultiSeedExplorer, SemanticFieldExplorerInternal, ConlluConverter, BlackLabSnippetParser, CollocateQueryHelper, SemanticFieldExplorer (stub-based), BCQLParser, CqlUtils, LogDiceCalculator, LongIntHashMap
e2e/ test directory is empty — no end-to-end tests; the full path from HTTP request to BlackLab query execution to response formatting is not tested in an integrated way
regression/ test directory is empty — no regression test suite protecting against previously fixed bugs
viz/ test directory is empty — but RadialPlotTest exists in api/, so the RadialPlot class is tested

BlackLabQueryExecutor is the core query engine (high import count, complex logic) — BlackLabQueryExecutorTest.java exists but uses stub-based testing (BlackLabDummyTest.java) without a real index; critical production paths through executeCollocateSearch and collectHits are not exercised against actual BlackLab behavior
BlackLabConllUIndexer has no test — ConlluConverterTest tests the preprocessing step only; the actual BlackLab indexing step is untested
HandlersTest uses inline MockExchange — reasonable for HTTP unit testing, not coupled to implementation details
SemanticFieldExplorerTest uses StubExecutor correctly: tests algorithmic logic without index dependency — good separation of concerns
No snapshot tests detected — appropriate for a data-processing system where outputs change with corpus

Test-production coupling: HandlersTest directly accesses package-private handler classes (SketchHandlers, ConcordanceHandlers) — tests will break on refactoring package structure but are functionally accurate

strengths: Core algorithmic components (CollocateProfileComparator, MultiSeedExplorer, SemanticFieldExplorer) have dedicated unit tests using stub executors — testing the algorithm independently of the index
HttpApiUtils and WrapHandler are tested at the utility level — error mapping behavior is covered
GrammarConfigLoader and RelationUtils tests cover configuration loading, which is a critical bootstrap path
No snapshot test overuse — tests use explicit assertions throughout
test_strategy.issue_character: The gap is at the integration level: unit tests are thorough for algorithmic components but the codebase has no integration or end-to-end tests covering the full request-to-response pipeline, and the critical indexing path is untested.
test_strategy.score_rationale: Against a 60-anchor for 'significant drag', this codebase sits above that for unit test quality but below 80 for overall strategy. The unit test suite covers the algorithmic core well using stub-based isolation. However, the empty e2e/ and regression/ directories signal a known gap: there is no verification that the full system works end-to-end, and no regression safety net for the indexer. The BlackLabQueryExecutor — the single most complex class, sitting at the boundary between the application and the BlackLab library — has no integration tests against a real index, meaning subtle query behavior differences are only discoverable in production.

issues.summary: e2e/ and regression/ directories are empty; no integration test covers the full HTTP-request-to-BlackLab-result pipeline
evidence: e2e/ directory contains no test files
regression/ directory contains no test files
The full path WordSketchApiServer → ExplorationHandlers → SemanticFieldExplorer → BlackLabQueryExecutor → CollocateQueryHelper → BlackLab index is never tested as a unit
issues.suggestion: Add a small integration test that spins up a minimal BlackLab index from a fixture CoNLL-U file, starts the API server on a random port, and exercises at least /health and /api/sketch/{lemma} round-trips; this protects against library version changes and wiring regressions

issues.summary: BlackLabConllUIndexer has no test; the indexing pipeline (the only path that produces the data the server queries) is entirely untested
evidence: ConlluConverterTest tests the CoNLL-U → WPL chunk conversion step only
BlackLabConllUIndexer (the BlackLab index writer) has no corresponding test class
issues.suggestion: Add a smoke test for BlackLabConllUIndexer: create a temp directory, index a minimal 10-sentence CoNLL-U fixture, verify the index is openable by BlackLabQueryExecutor and returns at least one result for a known lemma

root_causes: Integration testing deferred: the empty e2e/ and regression/ directories suggest integration tests were planned but not yet implemented; unit test investment was prioritized over integration coverage
